On the demo call, identify the person frustrated with the status quo, invest time with them, give them ROI ammunition and reference customers, and make them successful.

Brooke Choi (Regional Sourcing Manager) and Lawrence Law (Cluster Head Supply Chain) are Evaluators but passive. The immediate play is to convert one of the evaluators into a champion by delivering differentiated value (AI thought leadership, peer benchmarks, agentic sourcing roadmap preview) that makes them successful internally and gives them a reason to pull Zycus through their organization over alternatives.

Stalled momentum with overdue commitments creating ghost risk: Demo session promised for early May is 57 days overdue, buyer engagement has been silent for 72 days since 15 April meeting, and the deal remains in Qualified stage 94 days post-creation. The immediate play is a direct executive re-engagement (owner's manager Carl Kimball to Stuart Wood) to diagnose the stall, confirm continued interest, and reset the demo as a formal multi-stakeholder validation session with a mutual close plan coming out of it.
